feature.name: SQL token tree navigation core
feature.description: Extract sqlparse's SQL parsing and token tree traversal behavior as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: parse SQL text into Statement token trees
support token tree traversal and identifier helpers
preserve parent/ancestor relationships and comparison navigation
extract identifiers, aliases, and CTE structure from parsed statements
Identifier.get_name/get_real_name/get_alias and token ancestor navigation within Where clauses
excluded_behaviors: packaging metadata from the original project

entanglement.description: Token tree navigation depends on grouping passes, token tree classes, and identifier helpers spread across multiple modules.
signals: public API hides a multi-module runtime closure

output.import: from featurelifted import parse, parsestream; from featurelifted import sql, tokens
output.signature: parse(sql: str, encoding: str | None = None) -> tuple[Statement, ...]
